description: High specification, large stylish apartment in one of Derby's most desired developments in Mickleover. Comprises two double bedrooms (master with en-suite), a beautifully fitted kitchen, spacious contemporary lounge, and separate dining area. Features a balcony facing green, allocated parking, integrated appliances, central heating, and storage cupboard. Located in a well-connected suburb close to Derby city centre, Derbion shopping centre, the A50 (connecting M1 and M6), and the Royal Derby Hospital (less than a mile away). EPC Rating: B | Council Tax Band: A.
